name: 不香の花 - Snow Flower
short_description: Takeru, a city-raised high schooler, was forced to move deep into the snow-covered mountains. But there he encountered his childhood friend, who was earnestly tackling the problems facing the mountains.
detailed_description:
Title: Snow Flower

Content: Visual Novel Game

・About the Translation Patch

A volunteer has kindly created an English translation patch.

Please refer to the Community Hub.

※This is because we cannot include external links on the store page.

※We do not provide support for the translation patch here.

・Synopsis

Takeru, a high school student living a balanced life while working part-time as a designer in the city, is forced to move to a remote mountain village covered in snow. Unaccustomed to mountain life, he spends his days complaining about wanting to return to the city.

But there, he encounters his childhood friend, who is earnestly striving to address the problems facing the mountains──.

・Game Overview

The scenario is a linear path with no branching, offering about 2-3 hours of content. There are no character voices. A key feature is that illustrations progress almost entirely through still images, without using character portraits. (See product images)

・Regarding Gameplay Videos

Feel free to create them.

Thank you.
